REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT GP STONE II, LP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED: 1. DEMURER TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR FRAUD AND MISREPRESENTATION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF FRAUD AND MISREPRESENTATION, INCLUDING WHO, WHEN, AND IN WHAT MANNER MADE THE REPRESENTATIONS; THAT REPRESENTATION WAS FALSE AT THE TIME IT WAS MADE; AND THAT PLAINTIFF REASONABLY RELIED ON THE MISREPRESENTATION. THE COURT NOTES THAT CURRENTLY THE SOLE REPRESENTATION ALLEGED TO HAVE BEEN MADE TO PLAINTIFF IS DESCRIBED IN PARAGRAPH 36(H). (OTHER ASSERTIONS INPARAGRAPH 36 ARE NOT "REPRESENTATIONS" AND/OR THEY ARE NOT ALLEGED TO BE FALSE). THIS REPRESENTATION IS ALLEGED TO HAVE BEEN MADE "PER THE PURCHASE CONTRACT." PURCHASE CONTRACT IS LOCATED IN EX. A (PER PARAGRAPH 36(A). NO REPRESENTATION DESCRIBED IN PARAGRAPH 36(H) CAN BE LOCATED IN EX. A. 2. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR FTC ACT VIOLATION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO CITE ANY AUTHORITY FOR THE PROPOSITION THAT SHE MAY BRING SUCH A CLAIM. ANY REQUEST FOR LEAVE TO AMEND TO ADD A NEW CAUSE OF ACTION SHALL BY PROPERLY NOTICED MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND. 3. DEMURRER TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF B&P 17203 AND EQUITABLE ESTOPPEL IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO ALLEGE FACTS IN SUPPORT OF EACH ELEMENT OF THESE CAUSES OF ACTION. THE COURT FURTHER NOTES THAT PLAINTIFF'S OPPOSITION WAS UNTIMELY FILED AND SERVED VIA REGULAR MAIL. IF PLAINTIFF FAILS TO COMPLY WITH CCP REQUIREMENTS FOR FILING AND SERVICE IN THE FUTURE, THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: A. PASCUAL, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-20-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Carolyn Cage (415-571-9951) Plaintiff/ opposing party in pro per.
Jonathan W. Black (925-362-3120) for Defendant/Moving party GP Stone II via CourtCall.

Hearing is held. DF submits to tentative. Plaintiff Argued re: designated mortgage, annual statements, partial ownership rights, seller disclosure, interest rates and ADA accommodations. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT GP STONE II, LP DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED:
1. Demurer to the causes of action for fraud and misrepresentation is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of fraud and misrepresentation, including who, when, and in what manner made the representations; that representation was false at the time it was made; and that Plaintiff reasonably relied on the misrepresentation. The Court notes that currently the sole representation alleged to have been made to Plaintiff is described in paragraph 36(h). (Other assertions inparagraph 36 are not "representations" and/or they are not alleged to be false). This representation is alleged to have been made "per the purchase contract." Purchase Contract is located in Ex. A (per paragraph 36(a). No representation described in paragraph 36(h) can be located in Ex. A.
2. Demurrer to the cause of action for FTC Act violation is sustained without leave to amend. Plaintiff fails to cite any authority for the proposition that she may bring such a claim. Any request for leave to amend to add a new cause of action shall by properly noticed motion for leave to amend. 3. Demurrer to the causes of action for violation of B&P 17203 and equitable estoppel is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts in support of each element of these causes of action. The Court further notes that Plaintiff's opposition was untimely filed and served via regular mail. If Plaintiff fails to comply with CCP requirements for filing and service in the future, the filings will be stricken. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported (D501)

Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
